name: [GRIDHAND] Win-Back Agent - No purchase/visit in 60 days → special discount offer

gridhand.scenario: No purchase/visit in 60 days → special discount offer
gridhand.description: When a customer hasn't made a purchase or visited the business in 60 days, GRIDHAND's automation workflow is triggered, sending a personalized email via Mailchimp at 10am on the 61st day with a special 15% discount offer on their next service, prompting them to book an appointment or make a purchase within the next two weeks. This email is customized with the customer's name and their favorite services, increasing the likelihood of re-engagement and driving revenue for the business. By reactivating dormant customers, the business owner can boost sales and retention, ultimately leading to increased customer loyalty and a stronger bottom line.
